data.body: PASS. Reviewed cold against the plan's acceptance criteria. All 8 locked worked-example rows appear in the audit doc (6 verbatim; LabPage:16 and DocumentBadge:61 intentionally re-classified per the post-impl orchestrator commit ec5d917; the LabPage:49,58 text-white color row adds a trailing grouping-rule sentence but the row's classification and rationale are preserved). Structure follows audit-prompt section 10 (Page block / Typography audit / Color audit / Gap appendix). Coverage: 14 typography rows + 17 color rows across all 6 in-scope files (LabPage.tsx, DocumentGrid.tsx, DocumentBadge.tsx, ArchiveToolbar.tsx, ArchiveSearch.tsx, PretextParagraph.tsx covered transitively via LabPage:58). 1 gap (Pretext-px at LabPage:58) appended to audit-gaps.md AND mirrored in the audit doc's Gap appendix. Format rules applied uniformly: composite cascade, (file + token) grouping, Pretext-px sizing, file:line at opening tag. Text-color rule applied uniformly: every text-white classified NEAR → text-background; every LAB_DEEP / house-publications-deep text use classified MIGRATE under the house-colors-for-display/highlight allowance. Focus-ring consistency: all 5 sites (DocumentBadge:61, ArchiveToolbar:64, ArchiveSearch:45×2, ArchiveSearch:60) normalize on house-publications-deep. DESIGN.md: exactly one new ### Text foregrounds sub-section between the Lab pinks note and Charcoal drift note, positive-declaration style, no Do/Don't, content matches plan verbatim. audit-prompt.md: all 6 narrow revisions present in place, no methodology rewrite. No src/ changes (git diff master...frac-20-audit-lab -- src/ is empty). Tests: pnpm typecheck passes; pnpm test shows 4 failures, all are the documented baseline failures (footer FRAC-88 italic, footer Jacquard, navigation mobile labels, neighborhood min-h-screen) — no regressions from this work. One observation worth surfacing to the human even on PASS: the audit doc adds a 'Forward observations' section before the Gap appendix flagging container text-sm vs canonical .text-body text-base in DocumentBadge:103 and DocumentGrid:29. This isn't called out in the plan's section-10 structure but it's additive and non-blocking — the orchestrator may want to decide whether 'Forward observations' becomes a canonical section in audit-prompt.md for future audits, or whether such observations should live only in audit-gaps.md. Coverage summary: 14 typography rows / 17 color rows / 1 gap / 6 files reviewed / typecheck pass / tests 143 pass + 4 baseline fail.
